gates.name: schema-compile + no-external-ref
gates.detail: Catalog compiles as a draft-2020-12 JSON Schema with only internal $refs.

gates.name: catalog-shape
gates.detail: Catalog satisfies the A2UI v1.0 catalog-shape meta-schema.

gates.name: instance
gates.detail: All 7 surface component instance(s) validate against #/$defs/anyComponent.

entries.note: dspack component description carried verbatim into the catalog component.
A2UI Buttons render a child component by ID; dspack Button has no equivalent slot (children are arbitrary React nodes).
A2UI requires a declarative action; dspack expresses this as an onClick handler prop, which is not representable in a declarative catalog.
Enum projected 6->3 (many-to-one); distinct source variants collapse.
No A2UI Button property corresponds to 'size'.
No A2UI Button property corresponds to 'disabled'.
No A2UI Button property corresponds to 'asChild'.
dspack accessibility is design-intent / a11y knowledge with no A2UI catalog representation.
dspack constraints is design-intent / a11y knowledge with no A2UI catalog representation.
dspack whenToUse is design-intent / a11y knowledge with no A2UI catalog representation.
dspack whenNotToUse is design-intent / a11y knowledge with no A2UI catalog representation.
dspack status/tags carried as catalog component metadata (x-dspack annotation).
dspack component description carried verbatim into the catalog component.
A2UI Card takes exactly one child by ID; dspack Card composes via sub-components (CardHeader/CardContent/CardFooter), which collapse to a single child slot.
No A2UI Card property corresponds to 'className'.
dspack composition is design-intent / a11y knowledge with no A2UI catalog representation.
dspack constraints is design-intent / a11y knowledge with no A2UI catalog representation.
dspack whenToUse is design-intent / a11y knowledge with no A2UI catalog representation.
dspack whenNotToUse is design-intent / a11y knowledge with no A2UI catalog representation.
dspack status/tags carried as catalog component metadata (x-dspack annotation).
dspack component description carried verbatim into the catalog component.
A2UI TextField owns its label; dspack Input relies on an external <label> element, so the label is synthesized.
A2UI two-way-binds value; dspack Input has no value prop in the contract.
Enum projected 5->3 (many-to-one); distinct source variants collapse.
No A2UI TextField property corresponds to 'placeholder'.
No A2UI TextField property corresponds to 'disabled'.
dspack accessibility is design-intent / a11y knowledge with no A2UI catalog representation.
dspack constraints is design-intent / a11y knowledge with no A2UI catalog representation.
dspack whenToUse is design-intent / a11y knowledge with no A2UI catalog representation.
dspack whenNotToUse is design-intent / a11y knowledge with no A2UI catalog representation.
dspack status/tags carried as catalog component metadata (x-dspack annotation).
A2UI content primitive required to render labels/titles in a surface.
A2UI-native property declared on a synthesized primitive (no dspack source).
A2UI structural primitive required to compose multiple children.
A2UI-native property declared on a synthesized primitive (no dspack source).
A2UI-native property declared on a synthesized primitive (no dspack source).

shadcn Badge has no native A2UI component. Its instances fold onto the Text primitive; the status-label semantics and the variant enum (default/secondary/outline/destructive) have no representation and are lost.

dspack Dialog is a compound component (DialogTrigger/Content/Header/Title/Description/Footer/Close) with required-children composition rules, focus management, and a11y roles. A2UI Modal exposes only trigger+content; the composition contract cannot be represented.
Same composition loss as Dialog, plus the defining AlertDialog semantics (non-dismissible, alertdialog role, focus-to-cancel) have no A2UI catalog representation.
No A2UI basic component corresponds to a dropdown menu (items, checkbox/radio items, sub-menus, separators). Omitted.
dspack 'hsl(222.2, 47.4%, 11.2%)' converted to '#0f172a' to satisfy theme.primaryColor's #rrggbb pattern.
Full token palette carried as a documented extension (additionalProperties allows it).
Token tier/alias relationships have no A2UI representation; only resolved values survive.
Usage patterns (preferred component combinations): A2UI catalogs describe renderable component shape, not design intent. Deliberate casualty.
Anti-patterns (deliberately ruled-out approaches): A2UI catalogs describe renderable component shape, not design intent. Deliberate casualty.
Framework bindings (import paths / packages): A2UI catalogs describe renderable component shape, not design intent. Deliberate casualty.
Layout primitives (breakpoints/grid/containers/spacing): A2UI catalogs describe renderable component shape, not design intent. Deliberate casualty.
Named theme overrides (e.g. dark mode): A2UI catalogs describe renderable component shape, not design intent. Deliberate casualty.

warnings.message: dspack button.size has no A2UI representation and was dropped.
dspack button.disabled has no A2UI representation and was dropped.
dspack button.asChild has no A2UI representation and was dropped.
dspack card.className has no A2UI representation and was dropped.
dspack input.placeholder has no A2UI representation and was dropped.
dspack input.disabled has no A2UI representation and was dropped.

dspack component 'badge' folds onto Text with loss: shadcn Badge has no native A2UI component. Its instances fold onto the Text primitive; the status-label semantics and the variant enum (default/secondary/outline/destructive) have no representation and are lost.

dspack component 'dialog' cannot be represented: dspack Dialog is a compound component (DialogTrigger/Content/Header/Title/Description/Footer/Close) with required-children composition rules, focus management, and a11y roles. A2UI Modal exposes only trigger+content; the composition contract cannot be represented.

dspack component 'alert-dialog' cannot be represented: Same composition loss as Dialog, plus the defining AlertDialog semantics (non-dismissible, alertdialog role, focus-to-cancel) have no A2UI catalog representation.
dspack component 'dropdown-menu' cannot be represented: No A2UI basic component corresponds to a dropdown menu (items, checkbox/radio items, sub-menus, separators). Omitted.
dspack 'patterns' has no A2UI catalog representation (deliberate casualty).
dspack 'antiPatterns' has no A2UI catalog representation (deliberate casualty).
dspack 'frameworkBindings' has no A2UI catalog representation (deliberate casualty).
dspack 'layout' has no A2UI catalog representation (deliberate casualty).
dspack 'themes' has no A2UI catalog representation (deliberate casualty).
